  ?seasonSeries wdt:P361 wd:Q155223 .
  ?season wdt:P361 ?seasonSeries .
  ?season wdt:P3225 ?player .

  BIND(IF(STRSTARTS(STR(?endTime) , "+") , SUBSTR(STR(?endTime) , 2 , 4) , SUBSTR(STR(?endTime) , 1 , 4)) AS ?yearStr)
  BIND(CONCAT(SUBSTR(?yearStr , 1 , 3) , '0') AS ?decade)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?player wdt:P413 wd:Q19842141 .
    BIND(?player AS ?center)
  }
}
GROUP BY ?decade
